modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble duplicating and moving questions in Google Forms

full_description_text: 
I am having a problem with Google Forms. I can't figure out how to duplicate questions or move them around. It's really frustrating because I need to organize my form better but I don't know how to do it.
short_description: Trouble duplicating and moving questions in Google Forms
description: I am having a problem with Google Forms. I can't figure out how to duplicate questions or move them around. It's really frustrating because I need to organize my form better but I don't know how to do it.
